Localization.Description: Attempt to attach or detach an address

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User failed to attach address {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}."
User is detaching address {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
User is attaching address {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
User failed to detach address {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}."
